commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Thus says the LORD, the God of Israel; Like these good figs, so will I acknowledge them that are carried away captive of Judah, whom I have sent out of this place into the land of the Chaldeans for their good. Literally, "know "with love, Psalm i. (Haydock) Jechonias was treated with honour, (4 Kings xxv. ) as well as Daniel (ii. ) and Zorobabel, of the same family, chap. The captives, under Sedecias, (ver. ) were much more abused, chap. (Calmet) This is the literal sense; the mystical shows that the good shall be rewarded. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
